statement: The top three CoWoS clients account for over 85% of TSMC output, with Nvidia at ~60% (~595,000 wafers) and AMD ~11% (~105,000 wafers) - extreme customer concentration in AI-accelerator packaging.
why: Concentration of CoWoS allocation among the top three clients means smaller customers face severe packaging-supply constraints and the supply chain carries single-vendor dependence risk.

impact.mechanism: Highly concentrated packaging allocation secures supply for the top clients while constraining rivals and concentrating supply-chain risk.

evidence.excerpt: the top three CoWoS clients combined account for 'over 85% of total output'

confidence.basis: Single secondary source (Forbes); reported wafer/share figures, not filing-grade.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: statement/trend changed (trend rising -> rising); sources: Forbes
